item.title: The Corsair's Logbook
item.description: I always like to write about the technologies I test/use as it gives me the opportunity of writing about "a thing" in my own way, telling a story.
item.content:encoded:
I always like to write about the technologies I test/use as it gives me the opportunity of writing about "a thing" in my own way, telling a story. That's how personally, I learn best. I mean, I look at a blog post and see the chapters, maybe I already know some of them and move ahead or tell myself "is there a detail I missed last time I read"?

So the question is: how does other relate to my technical blog posts? Do they relate to the story? Did they learn something?

While I can't be in the heads of the readers, I definitively can convey my own side of the story and what, as the Captain Corsair, I went through ... but not only.

So welcome to this more personal side of the Corsair, and if you found this Logbook, let me know on Twitter what you thought.

The Captain Corsair
